category: 01. あいさつと自己紹介

category: 01. あいさつと自己紹介

category: 01. あいさつと自己紹介
dialogue: A: Who do you work for? / B: I am ( ) with ABC Tech.

category: 01. あいさつと自己紹介
dialogue: A: Have you met Sarah? / B: No, we haven't been ( ) yet.

dialogue: A: I'll be working with you on this project. / B: I look forward to ( ) with you.

category: 01. あいさつと自己紹介
dialogue: A: Sorry, I didn't ( ) your name. / B: Oh, it's Ken.

category: 01. あいさつと自己紹介
dialogue: A: Let me ( ) my colleague, Jane. / B: Hello, Jane.

category: 01. あいさつと自己紹介
dialogue: A: I'm in the R&D team. / B: That ( ) interesting.

dialogue: A: Welcome to our office. / B: Thank you for ( ) me.

dialogue: A: Please have a ( ). The director will be with you shortly.

dialogue: A: Is there anything else I should ( )? / B: No, that's all for now.
